solutions.title: Solution
solutions.content:

#define

long

using

;
signed
main
()
{
int
n
,

;

>>

;
vector
<int>
A
(

*
n
);
for
(
int
i
=
0
;
i
<
n
;
i
++)
{
cin
>>
A
[
i
];
A
[
n
+
i
]
=
A
[
i
];
}

*=
2
;
vector
<int>
B
=
{
0
},
C
=
{
0
};
for
(
int
i
=
0
;
i
<
n
;
i
++)
B
.
push_back
(
B
.
back
()
+

[
i
]);

(
int
i
=
0
;

<

;

++)

.

(
C
.
back
()
+
(
A
[
i
]
*
(

[
i
]
+
1
))

2
);

=
0
;

(

i
=

;

<

;
i
++)

if
(
B
[
i

>=

int

=

(

.
begin
(),
B
.
end
(),
B
[
i
+
1
]
-

)
-

.
begin
();
int
cnt
=
C
[
i
+
1
]
-
C
[
z
];
int

=
B
[
i
+
1
]
-
B
[
z
];

too
=
len
-
days
;

+=
((
A
[
z
-
1
]
*
(
A
[
z
-
1
]
+
1
))

2
);

-=
(((
A
[

-

]

)
*
(

[

-

2

=

(

,

);

}
cout
<<

;
